input.description: Speech that's heavy on numbers, dates, and percentages — common error sources for ASR

output.polishedSample: Speaker 1: Quick capture for my notes. I just got off the phone with John Robinson. He wants to put $250,000 into a fixed index annuity with a 7% first-year bonus. The contract he's looking at has a 10-year surrender period that starts at 12% and decreases by 1.5% per year. I need to send him the carrier comparison by April 15. And we have a follow-up call scheduled for April 22nd at 10:30 in the morning. He also asked about converting his old 401K, previous employer, that balances about $672,000. I told him I'd run two illustrations, one assuming a 6% return over 20 years and one assuming 4.5%. His birthday is November 3, 1958, so he'll be 67 this year and 70 when the surrender period ends.
output.summaryTLDR: John Robinson is interested in investing $250,000 in a fixed index annuity with a 7% first-year bonus and a 10-year surrender period. A follow-up call is scheduled for April 22nd.
